about.title: About Me
about.desc: I’m Velisse — a multidisciplinary designer with a passion for turning ideas into visually impactful experiences. From sleek UI design to engaging brand visuals, I help businesses and creators tell their stories with clarity, creativity, and confidence.

4.paragraph: Built through trust, clarity, and results.
